compiled_state.title: Update hook tests group A for v3 allowlist patterns
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Update hook tests group A: replace v2 allowlist assertions with v3 patterns. Affected files: (1) test-deps.sh: lines 157,172-173,199,204-205,214,219-221 - update assertions from v2 to v3 ticket directory pattern. (2) test-dispatcher-framework.sh: line 168,173-175 - update EXCLUDE_PATTERNS assertion. (3) test-performance-validation.sh: line 87 - update dup patterns check. (4) test-review-gate-allowlist.sh: verify no v2 references (grep showed 0 hits). (5) test-review-gate-non-reviewable.sh: lines 6-7,42,83,89,119,126,139,161 - update allowlist path references. (6) test-review-complexity-classifier.sh: line 385 - update diff fixture path. Depends on T11 (aee4-32d6).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: hook tests group A updated to v3
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
